findings.evidence: `card_pointSet`, `card_OSet`, and `card_XSet` are tagged `[simp]` at `Diagram.lean:132`, `Diagram.lean:712`, and `Diagram.lean:717`, while `card_columnSwapNeighbors` at `Diagram.lean:343` has the same canonical-cardinality role but no annotation.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `card_columnSwapNeighbors`; the rewrite is unconditional and terminates toward a numeric normal form.
findings.issue: `card_columnSwapNeighbors` is the normal-form cardinality theorem for the public `columnSwapNeighbors` finset, but it is not marked `[simp]`, so downstream `simp` will not reduce `x.columnSwapNeighbors.card` to `n.choose 2`.

summary: The public surface is mostly scoped to the stated support-cardinality target, but one canonical cardinality theorem is missing the automation annotation expected for this computability API.
